mapper.sql: select n.content_id, n.column_id, c.column_name, n.title, n.summary, n.content, n.status, n.images, n.videos, n.attachments, n.source, n.author, n.editor, n.source_url, n.publish_time, n.sort_order, n.create_by, n.create_time, n.update_by, n.update_time from publisher_news_content n left join publisher_news_column c on c.column_id = n.column_id
mapper.insert: insert into publisher_news_content (column_id, title, summary, content, status, images, videos, attachments, source, author, editor, source_url, publish_time, sort_order, create_by, create_time) values (#{columnId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{status}, #{images}, #{videos}, #{attachments}, #{source}, #{author}, #{editor}, #{sourceUrl}, #{publishTime}, #{sortOrder}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_news_content where content_id in
#{contentId}
